thesis: PRE-CLOSE window ~15:00 ET Monday 7/20 (generated 2026-07-20T18:48:19Z, marketClosed=false) — tomorrow-first positioning into the close and overnight, updating this morning's ~10:48am plan with what the intraday tape actually did. STRUCTURE FIRST off the most-recent CONFIRMED completed daily bar (Friday's 7/17 close) plus today's live intraday tape; persistence by distinct COMPLETED daily bars is unchanged at 7 (7/09->7/10->7/13->7/14->7/15->7/16->7/17; 7/17 confirmed, today's live Monday bar has NOT settled and is not counted). WHAT CHANGED INTO THE CLOSE: (1) the index gave back the morning's hold — SPY 742.93 has drifted back to its rising 50-day (~743.5) and now sits -0.07% just UNDER it (down from the morning's +0.20% above), -1.94% off the ATH (~757.6); the bull-stack is intact but the 50-day is now a coin-flip pivot, not a held floor. (2) MSFT 400.43 has clawed all the way UP to its 50-day — now only -0.16% below (~401.1, mom5 +2.41), the tightest contest of the reclaim yet (up from the morning's -1.47%), though still bear-stacked and -8.43% below its 200-day and NOT through. (3) VIX eased further to 18.02 (from the morning 18.22 and Friday's 18.77) — the multi-session firming partly relented into the close. WHAT DID NOT: QQQ 698.36 is still TANGLED and -2.81% BELOW its 50-day (~718.6, mom5 -1.88) — the reclaim stays UNWON and actually drifted slightly further below; the momentum/semis complex stays soft (SPMO mom5 -3.15, VGT -1.59, SOXX rsMom1m -12.42, 1/12 up-momentum). The DEFENSIVE/ENERGY rotation is CONFIRMED and STRENGTHENED on this run's fresh RRG (sector read 2026-07-20T18:48:19Z): XLE Leading (rsRatio 100.54>100, accel +2.64 board-best, rsMom 103.13 board-best, +13.52% >200d, rotation into) with real assets leading underneath (real-assets read 13:30Z: BNO 68.6 Uptrend board leader mom21 +14.31, USO 67.9, DBC 66.8, DBA 65.5 all Uptrend), XLRE/XLP still Leading, while XLF has rolled to Peaking (accel -1.34, rotation out despite the top RS level 101.63) and XLV (accel -2.28, worst) / XLI (accel -1.48) weaken. TACTICAL, last: Friday's monthly OPEX is RESOLVED — dealer gamma has RESET for the new monthly cycle, so any prior pin/wall/magnet values are DEAD; Monday's fresh post-OPEX gamma walls, VIX9D/VIX3M term structure and the live 7/29 FedWatch path are NOT in this run and MUST be re-pulled before sizing anything off positioning, vol term structure or the Fed into the close/overnight. Plan into the close and overnight: HOLD the bull-stack but do NOT add index beta while SPY is back on its 50-day, QQQ is tangled below its own 50-day and vol is firm; ROTATE toward the now-stronger, oil-confirmed XLE over weakening XLV; TRIM stretched, still-heavy semis into any late strength; HOLD (don't chase) MSFT as it presses its 50-day from just below into the 7/29 capex guide; carry a small defined-risk overnight hedge toward the underpriced 7/29 hike tail after re-verifying the live path.
